description: Angular component for creating an order, including form handling, product selection, and order submission.

classes.name: CreateComponent
classes.description: Angular component class for creating an order with product selection and form handling.

methods.name: ngOnInit
methods.description: Initializes the component, fetches products, and sets up the form.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a product to the order, increasing its quantity.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a product from the order, decreasing its quantity.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits the order form and navigates to the orders list.

methods.name: name
methods.description: Getter for the order name form control.

methods.name: productQuantity
methods.description: Checks if any product has a quantity greater than zero.
